rag_rules: Use assume/guarantee labels and eq/const declarations for AGREE syntax
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) in generated contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope
Avoid using AADL property names as AGREE variables
anti_patterns: Do not invent declarations in repair for unresolved references
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names (use int, real, bool)
irrelevant_topics: AADL scope notes (not relevant for AGREE generation)
